title: Three aircrafts report the same UFO between Quixadá-CE and João Pessoa-PB [2014]
excerpt: JAN 24th, 2014. One big white UFO was sighted by three different flying aircrafts in two locations within 50 minutes. FIRST SIGHT: at 09h10am, the aircraft of flight GLO 9109 from Brasília to Fortaleza, at 09h10am, in descent to the airport of Fortaleza, Ceará, reported by its TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) a fast object, […]
text_preview:
JAN 24th, 2014. One big white UFO was sighted by three different flying aircrafts in two locations within 50 minutes.

FIRST SIGHT: at 09h10am, the aircraft of flight GLO 9109 from Brasília to Fortaleza, at 09h10am, in descent to the airport of Fortaleza, Ceará, reported by its TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) a fast object, in a zigzag movement, and at a dangerous low altitude of 300 ft, which forced the GLO 9109 pilot to make an evasive maneuver to avoid collision with the UFO.

SECOND SIGHT: at 9:15 am, the aircraft on flight ONE 6372 from Guarulhos to Fortaleza, at 9:15 am, descen
summary: Three aircraft between Quixadá-CE and João Pessoa-PB reported the same large white UFO via TCAS within 50 minutes, forcing evasive maneuvers.
